geodata 0.6-10
  • Reference

Reference

All functions

bio_oracle()

Marine data

cmip6_world() cmip6_tile()

CMIP6 climate model data

country_codes()

Get country codes

crop_calendar_sacks() sacksCrops()

Sacks crop calendar data

rice_calendar()

crop calendar for rice

monfredaCrops() crop_monfreda()

Monfreda crop data

spamCrops() crop_spam()

SPAM crop data

cropland()

Cropland distribution data

elevation_3s() elevation_30s() elevation_global()

Elevation

footprint()

Human footprint

gadm()

Administrative boundaries

geodata-package geodata

Access Geographic Data

geodata_path()

Set the data path

landcover()

Landcover data

osm()

OpenStreetMap data

population()

population density

soil_af()

Soil data for Africa

soil_af_elements()

Soil elements data for Africa

soil_af_isda()

iSDA soil data for Africa

soil_af_isda_vsi()

iSDA soil data for Africa, virtual connection

soil_af_water()

Soil data for water balance computation (Africa only)

soil_world()

Global soil data

soil_world_vsi()

Global soil data, virtual connection

sp_genus() sp_occurrence() sp_occurrence_split()

Download species occurrence data from GBIF

travel_time()

Travel time to a city or port

world()

Administrative boundaries

worldclim_global() worldclim_country() worldclim_tile()

WorldClim climate data
